servers.name: property-db
servers.description: CRUD-style property database lookups – search, detail, compare, recent listings, and price history

servers.name: vector-search
servers.description: Embedding-based semantic property search – natural language queries, similarity matching, and description search

servers.name: graph-query
servers.description: Knowledge-graph traversal for property relationships, neighborhoods, schools, and commute analysis

servers.name: geocoding
servers.description: Location services – forward/reverse geocoding, distance calculation, and nearby amenity search

servers.name: market-data
servers.description: Real-estate market analytics – aggregate stats, price trends, comparable sales, and inventory levels

servers.name: user-preferences
servers.description: User-specific data management – preferences, search history, and saved/favorited properties
